biological_replicate: We analyzed Sirt2 expression in samples from 208 NSCLC patients...
technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: The study involves the comparison of acetylation and deacetylation effects on RRM2.
factor_value: KAT7 directly acetylates RRM2 at K95 and Sirt2 directly deacetylates RRM2.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
